dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7358 IH: Safer Rail Crossing Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Frost (for himself and Mr. Mast) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Transportation to issue guidance regarding State projects to reduce trespassing fatalities, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Safer Rail Crossing Act of 2026.

section.header: Guidance regarding State projects to reduce trespassing fatalities
section.text: Not later than 1 year after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of Transportation, acting through the Administrator of the Federal Highway Administration, shall issue guidance describing the types of projects under section 130(e)(1)(B) of title 23, United States Code, for which a State may use funds set aside under section 130(e)(1)(A) of such title.
